title: SessionStart takes the compact branch
action: Per D5/D6/D8/D19/D24/D27. In hooks/bee-session-init.mjs: when payload.source === 'compact', append the resume compaction record and emit buildCompactCapsule(root, {sessionId, handoffOutcome}) instead of buildSessionPreamble — PASSING handoffOutcome, the value the hook already computes at :113-121 and already hands to buildSessionPreamble at :144 (D27). Omitting it silently drops the `- Adoption not applied:` line for a compacted session holding a planned-next handoff, and no existing assertion would catch that. Every other source keeps buildSessionPreamble byte-identical (D8). LEAVE intentLeadBlock AND ANCHOR_LEAD_SOURCES UNTOUCHED (D19) — the hook keeps prefixing the anchor on compact and resume exactly as today, so the shape stays `anchor + \n\n + body` and only the body changes. ADOPT_SOURCES and the adoption path are untouched. The hook stays a thin caller — no logic here (D3). Extend scripts/test_compact_capsule.mjs with through-the-hook rows: a compact SessionStart emits anchor-then-capsule with the anchor appearing exactly ONCE, asserted by COUNT not by startsWith; a compact SessionStart with a planned-next handoff present emits the `- Adoption not applied:` line (D27); a resume SessionStart still emits anchor-then-full-preamble. Then the D24 regen chain: mirror the hook, render plugin trees, self-onboard, release_manifest --write — editing hooks/ moves release_manifest --check (release_manifest.mjs:133) even though it does NOT move ledger_parity (which covers only .bee/bin/lib and helpers, ledger_parity.mjs:139-140). RED-FAILURE EVIDENCE IS REQUIRED AT CAP: write the new rows first, record their failing output against the un-wired hook, then wire it.

truths: The anchor appears exactly ONCE in a compact SessionStart's output, asserted by count.
A compact SessionStart with a planned-next handoff present emits the `- Adoption not applied:` line, proving handoffOutcome reached the capsule (D27).
hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs is green with zero edits, including the resume additivity row at :2740-2780 and the HANDOFF rows at :2427-2455 and :2864-2872.
The recorded red output of the new rows against the un-wired hook is attached as cap evidence.
release_manifest --check is green at cap time.
artifacts: The compact branch passing handoffOutcome, its mirror, through-the-hook test rows, refreshed manifest
prohibitions: Never edit hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs in this cell — the SessionStart rows must stay green untouched.
Never put capsule logic in the hook.

verify: node scripts/test_compact_capsule.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: SessionStart emits the D6 compact capsule on source=compact, carrying the hook's already-computed handoffOutcome (D27) and appending D5's resume compaction record; every other source keeps buildSessionPreamble byte-identical (D8). intentLeadBlock/ANCHOR_LEAD_SOURCES untouched (D19) — the anchor still renders exactly once, asserted BY COUNT in three new through-the-hook rows. hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs green with zero edits (193 rows). D24 regen chain run in order.

NOTE: the handoff row's FIRST draft passed red because buildSessionPreamble ALSO renders `- Adoption not applied:` (D26); it was strengthened to assert the line rides the capsule and to compare against buildCompactCapsule with vs without the outcome, which is what made it discriminate. Full output: .bee/tmp/cz-6/verify.txt",
  "decisions_honored": {
    "D5": "SessionStart(source=compact) appends the `resume` compaction record; asserted as exactly one record, event=resume, compact_index=0 (plain prior count, never +1).",
    "D6": "the capsule replaces the preamble on compact only",
    "D8": "startup/clear/resume keep buildSessionPreamble byte-identical — asserted for resume through the hook, and startup/clear covered by the untouched contract rows",
    "D19": "intentLeadBlock and ANCHOR_LEAD_SOURCES untouched; the capsule predicate is a SEPARATE constant (CAPSULE_SOURCE = 'compact'), deliberately not reusing ANCHOR_LEAD_SOURCES which also carries 'resume'",
    "D24": "regen chain run in order: render_plugin_skill_trees -> onboard_bee --repo-root . --apply -> release_manifest --write; release_manifest --check carried in the verify",
    "D27": "buildCompactCapsule(root, {sessionId, handoffOutcome}) — the hook's already-computed handoffOutcome is carried through, asserted at the call site",
    "D3": "the hook stays a thin caller: sessionBody() knows only which source trims and that handoffOutcome must be carried; all capsule/record logic stays in lib/compaction.mjs"
  },
  "fail_open": "the compact branch is wrapped so a repo vendored before compaction.mjs shipped falls back to buildSessionPreamble and logs the crash — orientation never fails a session."
}
